name: Outrageous Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, beat together sugars, butter, peanut butter, vanilla extract, and egg until creamy and well blended.
3. Mix in flour, oats, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until light golden brown.
7. Cool cookies on the sheet for 1 minute before removing them.
